ab: taluvaʉlana ari kani’i, hlikisuamu ahlalua ahlaina musa Taitu takuliliungu tamalʉngalʉ.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: angahli a mu Taipakʉ mutatungusa likihli apuhlu musa Taitu.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: miungu cu Taitu, mulikihli tamalʉngalʉna mʉcʉkʉhlʉ utatungusa likihli ruavici ihlahlamu.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: kuuasaihla aatʉ utatungusa likihlina saliaisa tamalʉngalʉna, mulikihli mu’alivatʉna ia miungu cu.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle’s house, and it’s just a short drive away.

ab: liliunga saliaisa tamalʉngalʉ maru tam taisa taupangana ’ivingi, mʉlʉsʉamu likihli umarua sapahlʉ musa mahlukua taupangana ’ivingi.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle’s house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: ma taupangana ’ivingi, ruavici tamalʉngalʉ amu pau ’ukui nua mutatungusa tarʉmʉcʉ kavahlʉ.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: ruvana, kualʉsiamu musa mahlukua miararuma ikatumahlama uumau kuaruvaruvana.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: tamtumuhlu likihli a miararuma ikatumahlana, kuhlaisai mulikihliamu likihli umaru ’urai musa kaaiu.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: akuku miacikiri, pausu’ulu paralikapi cu, mutungusucuamu likihli kikucu musa.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: puailicuamu Taipakʉ kani’i, paitatʉahlicui likihliisa umaru ’urai tamalʉngalʉna.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don’t know if my uncle’s motorcycle has been found.
